source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Top Drive Contact Injury

context.region: Gulf of Mexico - Alaminos Canyon Block 735

event.top_event: Loss of Containment - Personnel in Line of Fire
actions_taken: IP escorted to onboard medical facility
IP evacuated to UTMB Galveston, Texas
All stop and safety stand down with all crews
Added red barricade chain and sign for permit to work on ladder leading down to carousel upper platform
Sent alert to all rigs with multipurpose tower configuration
event.summary: On December 8, 2023, at approximately 08:30 am, a Floorhand (IP) sustained a lost time injury when contacted by the Top Drive System (TDS) while positioned on the port pipe racker upper access platform approximately 80 feet above the drill floor on the Noble Globetrotter II drilling rig. The IP had moved to the platform to troubleshoot a 'slack rope detected' alarm without notifying the Driller. As the Driller lowered the TDS during tripping operations, the lower port TDS roller assembly contacted the IP, folding his upper torso around the outside handrail. The IP sustained a punctured lung, fractured ribs, and a fractured scapula. The incident resulted from inadequate communication, failure to identify the moving equipment hazard in the JSA, lack of warning signage, and absence of engineered barriers despite only 3 inches clearance between the TDS and platform handrail.
recommendations: BSEE Lake Jackson District has no recommendations at this time
key_phrases: port pipe racker upper access platform

hazards.name: Moving Top Drive System with inadequate clearance

threats.name: Personnel entering line of fire without notification
Driller operating TDS without awareness of personnel location

consequences.name: Personnel injury - caught between moving equipment
Lost time injury requiring medical evacuation

controls.name: Communication protocol between IP and Driller
controls.barrier_role: Prevent personnel entering hazard zone without notification
controls.lod_basis: First line of defense - operational communication procedure

supporting_text: Inadequate communication between IP and Driller, Driller was not aware of the IP's position on the port pipe racker upper access platform
IP failed to notify the drill floor that they were moving from the port carousel access platform (IP's expected location) back to the port pipe racker upper access platform
The IP overheard the 'slack rope detected' alarm and returned to the port pipe racker upper access platform without notifying the Driller

controls.name: Job Safety Analysis (JSA) for drifting drill pipe
controls.barrier_role: Identify moving equipment hazards before work begins
controls.lod_basis: First line of defense - pre-job hazard identification

supporting_text: BSEE investigators noted the TDS moving equipment hazard was not identified on the JSA (Job Safety Analysis) used for verifying drill pipe internal diameter
The only moving equipment hazards identified on the JSA were for the pipe racker and the pipe storage carousel
Inadequate hazard analysis and engineering control

controls.name: Warning signage and cautions for moving equipment hazard
controls.barrier_role: Alert personnel to moving equipment hazard
controls.lod_basis: First line of defense - hazard awareness signage

supporting_text: BSEE investigators noticed there were no warnings or cautions identifying the moving equipment hazard on or around the port pipe racker upper access platform
There was no posted or visible warning, caution or moving equipment advisories on the port pipe racker upper access platform identifying the moving equipment hazard
This may have given the IP a false sense of safety while on the port pipe racker upper access platform

controls.name: Engineered barrier preventing access during TDS operations
controls.barrier_role: Physically prevent access to hazard zone during operations
controls.lod_basis: Second line of defense - physical barrier to prevent access

supporting_text: An engineered barrier preventing access to the port pipe racker upper access platform during operations or until safe clearance is granted would have prevented the injury from occurring
The TDS has a 3-inch clearance between TDS and the handrail of the port pipe racker upper access platform

Lessee failed to identify the moving top drive assembly as a safety hazard while personnel are accessing the port pipe handler access platform. There was no engineering barrier to prevent or alert personnel of the hazard
Added red barricade chain and sign for permit to work on ladder leading down to carrousel upper platform

controls.name: Driller awareness of personnel locations
controls.barrier_role: Ensure operator awareness before moving equipment
controls.lod_basis: First line of defense - operational awareness procedure

supporting_text: Driller was not aware of the IP's position on the port pipe racker upper access platform
Communication breakdown prevented all crew members from knowing the safe location of each member during operations

controls.name: Handrails on port pipe racker upper access platform
controls.lod_basis: Second line of defense - physical fall protection

supporting_text: The IP was not required to don a safety harness since the port pipe racker upper access platform is protected by handrails
the lower port TDS roller assembly contacted the IP folding his upper torso around the outside handrail while the IP's legs remained stationary and inside the port pipe racker upper access platform
Once the TDS passed the IP, the IP fell back onto the port pipe racker upper access platform

controls.name: Onboard medical facility and evacuation capability

supporting_text: The Tool-pusher and both ADs escorted the IP down the elevator and to the onboard medical facility
After consultation with the medic the IP was evacuated to UTMB Galveston, Texas and diagnosed with a punctured lung, fractured ribs, and a fractured scapula

controls.name: Handheld radio communication system
controls.lod_basis: First line of defense - communication equipment

supporting_text: Next, the Driller used a handheld radio to request the IP's assistance with trouble shooting the 'slack rope detected' alarm
The IP used their handheld radio to request assistance

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
